nasb.text: Then you shall cut the ram into its pieces, and wash its entrails and its legs, and put them with its pieces and its head.

esv.text: Then you shall cut the ram into pieces, and wash its entrails and its legs, and put them with its pieces and its head,

cnv.text: 你要把公綿羊切成塊子，再把內臟和羊腿洗淨，放在肉塊和羊頭上面。

ccb.text: 再把羊切成块状，用水洗净所有的内脏和腿，跟肉块和头放在一起。
